name: UNIC Academic Merit Scholarship
eligibility: Bulgarian UG/PG admits with GPA ≥18/20 (or equivalent) or distinction averages; EU tuition band.
deadline: Applied at offer stage; renewal tied to GPA ≥7.5/10 or top percentile.
notes: Range and renewal GPA pulled from UNIC scholarship guidance; Bulgarians treated as EU fee status.

name: UNIC Need-Based Scholarship
eligibility: Admits showing financial need with supporting documentation; Bulgarian nationals and residents eligible.
deadline: Rolling with application and before registration
notes: Award percentage depends on demonstrated need; often paired with payment plans rather than full fee waivers.

name: UNIC Family/Sibling Discount
eligibility: Two or more immediate family members enrolled concurrently (incl. Bulgarian siblings).
deadline: Before first tuition installment each term
notes: Discount usually applies to the second student onward; can be combined with merit if total relief stays within policy caps.

name: UNIC Early Payment Discount
eligibility: Students paying full semester tuition by the published deadline (EU fee band).
notes: Commonly promoted during August/January collections; pairs with merit/need awards to reduce upfront proof-of-funds.

name: UNIC Athens Merit Scholarship (EU students)
eligibility: UNIC Athens admits from Bulgaria with strong academic profiles; mirrors Nicosia merit grid.
deadline: Applied at offer stage; renewal on GPA ≥7.5/10
notes: Athens campus follows the same EU-student merit bands during launch; confirm exact grid per program head.

name: Erasmus+ Semester Mobility Grant
eligibility: Bulgarian students enrolled at UNIC/UNIC Athens going on Erasmus+ exchange semester(s).
notes: Monthly grant range for Cyprus host institutions; only for temporary mobility, not full-degree, but offsets living costs.

name: DSK/OTP Study Abroad Consumer Loan
eligibility: Bulgarian nationals financing tuition/living costs abroad; standard creditworthiness applies.
notes: Not state-guaranteed; marketed as education-purpose consumer loan with grace period options useful for proof-of-funds.
